content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Implementation is correct and already complete. The attempt-aware status reconciliation was implemented in PR #116 (commit 93ab4eab) and refined in subsequent commits. The current bead's implementer correctly identified the pre-existing fix and validated it. Code review confirms: (1) run_attempt_boundary_sequence correctly computes the attempt boundary from the most recent run_started/run_resumed journal event or snapshot started_at fallback, defaulting to 0 for the missing-run_started edge case; (2) terminal_status_for_attempt only considers terminal events after the boundary sequence; (3) all callers (handle_status in cli/run.rs, run_status service functions, daemon_loop) use the attempt-aware API; (4) comprehensive test coverage across unit tests (workflow_engine_test.rs, run_queries_test.rs) and CLI integration tests (cli.rs) covering durable resume boundary, unjournaled resume with snapshot started_at fallback, missing run_started with terminal event, and end-to-end journal recovery after snapshot write failure. All tests pass. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
